skill.name: xiaohongshu-search
skill.description: 小红书笔记搜索工具。通过 Guaikei API 获取小红书热门笔记数据，支持关键词搜索、内容筛选、排序和格式化输出。
skill.summary: 小红书笔记数据搜索工具，支持关键词查询和热门内容筛选
skill.author: um-why

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 7 files (734 lines). Static findings contained multiple false positives: ANSI color codes misidentified as obfuscation, Node.js HTTPS requests misidentified as Ruby backtick execution, and array slicing misidentified as path traversal. Confirmed legitimate use of network requests to third-party API (guaikei.com), environment variable access for API authentication, and file system operations for caching. Primary concern is hardcoded MD5-hashed default API token which poses credential security risk. Skill functionality is platform scraping for business analytics purposes.

medium_findings.title: Hardcoded Default API Token with Weak Hash
medium_findings.description: lib/key.js:20 contains hardcoded MD5 hash 'e10adc3949ba59abbe56e057f20f883e' (MD5 of '123456') as default API token fallback. This is a credential security concern as default tokens should not be reused across installations.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed hardcoded default token in source code. MD5 is cryptographically weak, though this serves as a fallback placeholder when no token is configured.

low_findings.title: Third-Party API Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill depends on external Guaikei API (www.guaikei.com) for data access. This creates availability and privacy dependencies beyond the skill author's control.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded API hostname confirmed. Skill will not function if third-party service is unavailable.

dangerous_patterns.title: Static Analysis False Positives
dangerous_patterns.description: 58 external_commands flags (Ruby backtick), hex-encoded obfuscation flags, and path traversal flags were incorrectly detected. Actual code uses: 1) ANSI terminal color codes (\x1b[XXm), 2) Node.js https.request() for network, 3) Array slice operations (not filesystem paths). These are legitimate patterns misidentified by pattern matching.

content.user_title: Search Xiaohongshu notes with keyword filtering
content.value_statement: Need to find trending content on Xiaohongshu? This tool queries the Guaikei API to retrieve and filter popular notes by keywords, content type, and engagement metrics.
actual_capabilities: Search Xiaohongshu notes by keyword with real-time API query
Filter results by content type: all, videos only, or image-text posts
Sort by relevance, recency, likes, comments, or bookmarks
Format output as JSON or Markdown for easy integration
Configure result limit from 1 to 60 notes per search
Idempotency check prevents duplicate API calls within 2 minutes
limitations: Requires valid GUAIKEI_API_TOKEN environment variable for full access
Limited to 60 results per search query
Depends on third-party Guaikei API for data retrieval
May be rate-limited by the upstream API service

use_cases.title: Content Creator Research
use_cases.description: Find trending topics and high-engagement posts for content ideation. Search by keyword to discover what resonates with Xiaohongshu audiences.

use_cases.title: Marketing Analytics
use_cases.description: Monitor keyword trends and competitor performance. Track engagement metrics like likes, comments, and shares for specific topics.

use_cases.title: KOL Discovery
use_cases.description: Identify popular posts and creators in specific niches to find potential collaboration partners for marketing campaigns.
use_cases.target_user: MCN agencies and brand partnerships teams

prompt_templates.title: Basic Note Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Xiaohongshu notes with keyword "{keyword}" and return 10 results in JSON format
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple keyword search with default settings

prompt_templates.title: Video Content Filter
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Xiaohongshu for video content about "{topic}", sorted by most liked, limit 20 results
prompt_templates.scenario: Filter by video content type and sort by engagement

prompt_templates.title: Markdown Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the top 30 most popular Xiaohongshu notes for "{keyword}" in markdown format

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Parameter Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Xiaohongshu notes: keyword "{keyword}", type image-text, sort by bookmarks, return 15 results

output_examples.input: Search for notes with keyword 'AI tutorial'
output_examples.output: Returns 10 notes with title, author, publish time, URL, engagement counts (likes, comments, bookmarks, shares), and cover images in JSON or Markdown format

output_examples.input: Search videos about 'travel' sorted by recent
output_examples.output: Lists latest 10 video posts about travel, formatted with timestamps and video metadata

best_practices: Set GUAIKEI_API_TOKEN environment variable before running searches for optimal performance
Use descriptive keywords (2-50 Chinese characters) for more accurate results
Implement appropriate rate limiting when running multiple searches in sequence
anti_patterns: Do not include URLs or special characters in search keywords
Avoid searching the same keyword multiple times within 2 minutes (idempotency lock will trigger)
Do not exceed 60 results per query to avoid API errors

faq.question: How do I configure the API token?
faq.answer: Set the GUAIKEI_API_TOKEN environment variable before running. Without it, a default token is used with limited functionality.

faq.question: What keyword formats are supported?
faq.answer: Keywords should be 2-50 Chinese characters or alphanumeric text. Avoid special characters, URLs, or symbols.

faq.question: How many results can I retrieve per search?
faq.answer: You can request 1 to 60 results per search. The default is 10 results.

faq.question: What content types can I filter by?
faq.answer: Type 0 returns all content, Type 1 returns only videos, and Type 2 returns only image-text posts.

faq.question: How do I sort the search results?
faq.answer: Sort 0 is comprehensive, Sort 1 is newest, Sort 2 is most liked, Sort 3 is most commented, and Sort 4 is most bookmarked.

faq.question: What output formats are available?
faq.answer: Use --output json for machine-readable JSON or --output markdown for human-readable formatted text.
